titleStmt.title: SII 28.115: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 115. (A.R. No. 270 of 1913.)

summary.p: CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.
Naṭarāja temple, First prākāra, east wall, left of entrance.

Records a royal order issued through Gāṅgēyarāyaṉ, granting 23 mā of land in several plots in the hamlets of Śrī-Vīranārāyaṇam alias Sundarapāṇḍiya-chcharuppēdimaṅgalam for taking out channels (tiru-ōḍai) and supplying flowers on the occassion of the service and festival instituted in the name of the king (Irajākkaḷ-nāyaṉ)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ § śrī melkirttikkumel komāṟapaṉmar tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ vikkirama pāṇṭiya tevarkku yāṇṭu Añcāvatu nāḷ 2 100 7 10nāḷ kāṅkeyarāyaṉ Olai Uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār
koil kaṇkāṇi kāraṇattārum tirukkai Oṭṭippaṇṭārattārum kaṇṭu perumāḷ tirunāmattāl kaṇṭaruḷiṉa Irācākkaḷnāyaṉ cantikkum ḷrThis is symbol for irājāĀkkaḷ nāyaṉ periya tirunāḷaikkum tiruppaḷḷittāmam Āka śrīviranā
rāyaṇamāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiyaccaruppetimaṅkalattu tiruōṭai ceytu tiruppaḷḷittāmam Eṇṇuvatāka Ivvūrppiṭākai vikke śvaranallūr ḷra cūṭāmaṇi nallūr Irācentiracoḻanallūr civapātacekaram
tiruoṭai Uḷḷiṭṭa tiruoṭaikaḷukku vaṭakiṭaiyāṉa nilamāna perumāḷ tirunāmattāl Irācākkaḷ nāyaṉ tiruoṭai Eṉṟu ceyyat tirumukam Eḻutiṉa nilam Irupattu nālumāvukku Ivvūr capaiyār
nti taṭi Uḷvaripaṭi Irācacūṭāmaṇi nallūr taṭi Iraṇṭiṉāl nilam nālumākkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum vikkecuranallūr taṭi nāliṉāl nilam pati Orumākāṇi muntirikaiyum Irācentira coḻa mu
ṉṟiṉāl rūpāy Eṭṭu mākkāṇiyum Āka rūpāy Irupattu nālumāvum Iṉṉāḷ mutal tiruoṭaiyāka mutal koṇṭu muṉpu civapākaracekaram tiruoṭai Uḷḷiṭṭa tiruoṭaikaḷukku tiruppaḷḷittāmam Eṇṇi varukiṟa
tiruppū maṇṭapattukku mutalāka tiruppaḷḷittāmam Eṇṇuvārkaḷākavum Ippaṭikku tirumāḷikaiyile kalveṭṭavum paṇṇuvate Ippaṭi ceyya paṇṇuvate Ivai kāṅkeyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 28.115 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
